parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ tenantId: $json.tenantId, fromAddress: $json.fromAddress, subject: $json.subject, bodyText: $json.bodyText, classification: $json.classification }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const email = $('04. Décider action').first().json;

return [{ json: {
  tenantId: email.tenantId,
  emailId: email.emailId,
  fromAddress: email.fromAddress,
  toAddress: email.toAddress,
  subject: email.subject,
  bodyPreview: email.bodyPreview,
  classification: email.classification,
  action: 'classified',
  replyAction: 'none',
  replyConfidence: 0,
  tokensUsed: 0
} }];

const logResult = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, data: { message: 'Email traité', logId: logResult.data?.id || null } } }];
